title: Franky Resists CP9
description: Franky and Sanji push deeper into the Sea Train while Robin and CP9 remain the true targets of the chase.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Sanji, Franky, Nico Robin, Spandam, CP9 agent. Franky and Sanji push deeper into the Sea Train while Robin and CP9 remain the true targets of the chase.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: Of course, it'll keep repeating in

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: We should get inland for safety...

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: Thanks for the help, rope guy

dialogue.speaker: Wanze
dialogue.text: I'm still shaking from the fright....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Even I was scared for you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You're very lucky to have survived that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Of course, if I'd stayed at sea...

dialogue.speaker: Kokoro
dialogue.text: He got stuck in a chimney!

dialogue.speaker: Kokoro
dialogue.text: You got stuck in a chimney!!

dialogue.speaker: Wanze
dialogue.text: ZORD, that's so stupid! You're funny!

dialogue.speaker: Wanze
dialogue.text: I have something to tell you...

dialogue.speaker: Wanze
dialogue.text: Let's set sail and go after them!

dialogue.speaker: Wanze
dialogue.text: Hey! Rope guy! Lend us a boat!

summary: Franky and Sanji push deeper into the Sea Train while Robin and CP9 remain the true targets of the chase.
